name: Qatar Airways

carryOn.notes: Economy class: 1 carry-on up to 7 kg. Business class: 2 carry-on bags up to 15 kg total. Strictly enforced.

economy.notes: 1 bag included in most Economy fares.

fees.firstBag: Included in most fares; Economy Light does not include checked baggage
fees.overweight: Fees apply for bags over 23 kg in Economy

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Spare lithium-ion batteries permitted in carry-on only
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Carry-on only. Max 100Wh unrestricted. 101–160Wh with airline approval. Prohibited in checked baggage.
batteryRules.powerBankLimit: 100Wh unrestricted; up to 160Wh with Qatar Airways approval
batteryRules.laptops: Permitted in carry-on baggage. Must comply with security screening requirements.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: What is Qatar Airways carry-on weight limit?
faqs.answer: Economy class passengers may bring one carry-on bag weighing up to 7 kg (15 lbs). Business class passengers are allowed up to 15 kg total across two bags. Qatar Airways enforces weight limits at the gate.

faqs.question: Does Qatar Airways Economy include a checked bag?
faqs.answer: Most Qatar Airways Economy fares include one 23 kg checked bag. The Economy Light fare does not include checked baggage. Business class includes two 32 kg bags.

faqs.question: Can I bring a power bank on Qatar Airways?
faqs.answer: Power banks must be in your carry-on baggage only. Power banks up to 100Wh are permitted. Banks between 101–160Wh require Qatar Airways approval prior to travel. Power banks over 160Wh are prohibited.
